name: alpen-revenue
description: Alpen Platform revenue extensions on top of the upstream `sales` plugin. Adds proposal-composer, scope-builder, qbr-prep, status-report-composer — skills that consume the templates pack (templates/default/) and tier-ladder config to produce real Tier 1/2/3 deliverables. Integrates with the leads.db / contracts.db / engagements.db state machine.
